title: pseudostellaria jamesiana
intro: Pseudostellaria jamesiana, also known as Chinese starwort or mountain starwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Pseudostellaria jamesiana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal infections. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or made into a tincture, and it is also available in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
